recommendations.title: Les Francis
recommendations.overview: Comical trip to Corse reminiscent of A very bad trip.

recommendations.title: Honeymoon Crasher
recommendations.overview: When his fiancée dumps him at the altar for her ex, a young man is left with no alternative but to go on his romantic honeymoon with his mother.

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: Package Tour
recommendations.overview: Stig-Helmer and Ole Bramserud on a trip to the Canary Islands for Christmas.

recommendations.title: Unhappily Ever After
recommendations.overview: María José and Alfredo are about to celebrate their 20th anniversary and their children give them a trip to the hotel where they celebrated their honeymoon, but a spell will make them repeat the same day.

recommendations.title: Solo Mio

recommendations.title: The Road Within
recommendations.overview: A young man with Tourette's Syndrome embarks on a road trip with his recently-deceased mother's ashes.

recommendations.title: The Present

recommendations.title: Queen
recommendations.overview: Rani, a 24-year-old homely girl, decides to go on her honeymoon alone when her fiancé calls off the wedding. Traveling around Europe, she finds joy, makes friends, and gains new-found independence.

recommendations.title: The Way He Looks
